name: TEST - Service Period End Before PO Start (Line Items) (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.sp_item_end_date_export)
  and not is_empty(field.item_po_line_sp_start_date_normalized)
  and field.sp_item_end_date_export < field.item_po_line_sp_start_date_normalized
)

payload.content: The end date on the document is less than the start date on the item. Please double-check.
The end date on the document is less than the start date on the item. Please double-check.
